\tzpentry{ID4202}{Eigenvalue}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4202 introduces Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \lambda_n = -\left(\frac{n\pi}{L}\right)^2 + i\frac{\Omega_{\text{sun}}}{v_{sw}} \end{equation}
